name: Ground Beef Turnovers
recipeIngredient: Mix together and divide into 4 sections.
Make a giant hamburger with each section.
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix ingredients together and divide into 4 sections.
2. Make a giant hamburger with each section.
3. Place 1/4 of the mushroom mixture on half of each hamburger, leaving a 1-inch edge.
4. Fold the meat over the filling and firmly seal the edges with a fork.
5. Broil for about 10 minutes, turning the meat only once.
6. Serves 4.
